title: Register and complete access-code login
description: This verifies that a new user can register with email, enter an access code, and reach the authenticated experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Request an access code
Fill in the access code field with a valid numeric code
Submit the code
Verify the logged-in Radar is displayed
Verify the user is signed in

title: Publish a surf report with a photo and nearest spot
description: This verifies that a contributor can create a surf report from a photo, confirm the nearest spot, add observations, and publish it.

steps.description: Navigate to the public radar page
Start a quick photo capture
Capture or select an image
Confirm the nearest spot
Classify the post as a surf report
Add observations to the report
Publish the report
Verify a publish confirmation is visible
Verify the spot is highlighted on the radar and the photo appears in the spot timeline

title: Start contributing from the public app as a new user
description: This verifies that a visitor can choose to contribute and is guided toward account creation before publishing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Choose to contribute
Verify login or account creation is required to continue
Verify the public app entry remains accessible

title: Publish an environmental alert with category, severity, and description
description: This verifies that a user can create an environmental alert, complete the required details, and publish it publicly.

steps.description: Navigate to the public radar page
Open the actions flow
Start a new action
Choose environmental alert
Select a category
Add evidence to the alert
Confirm the location and city or state
Set the severity
Write a description
Publish the alert
Verify a publish confirmation is visible
Verify the alert appears on the map and on the related spot page

title: Explore public Radar content without signing in
description: This verifies that a public visitor can open the app, explore the Radar, and see that publishing is gated behind login.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Choose to explore first
Open the Radar view
Verify public Radar content is displayed
Verify publishing actions require login

title: Complete profile setup after first login
description: This verifies that a new authenticated user can fill in required profile details and finish onboarding.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Request an access code
Fill in the access code field with a valid numeric code
Submit the code
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the CPF field with a valid CPF
Fill in the city field with a valid city
Continue profile setup
Verify the logged-in Radar is displayed
Verify the profile setup flow is completed

title: Explore public Map content without signing in
description: This verifies that a public visitor can open the Map and browse public coastal content without an account.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Choose to explore first
Open the Map view
Verify public Map content is displayed
Verify spot markers or public map content are visible

title: Open a public spot from the radar and inspect its timeline
description: This verifies that a visitor can open a spot from the Radar, review its current conditions, and inspect the spot timeline.

steps.description: Navigate to the public radar page
Open a spot from the radar
Verify the spot page is displayed
Verify current conditions and the daily timeline are displayed

title: See sensitive details hidden on a restricted spot
description: This test verifies that a user opening a community or muted spot does not see sensitive real-time details that should be hidden by visibility rules.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the map
Open a spot with restricted visibility
Verify sensitive real-time details are not exposed
Verify the spot page remains accessible

title: Open a spot from the Radar feed
description: This verifies that a user can drill into a spot from the Radar and reach the spot page for current conditions.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Request an access code
Fill in the access code field with a valid numeric code
Submit the code
Open the Radar view
Open a spot from the feed
Verify the spot page is displayed
Verify current conditions for the spot are visible

title: Open a spot from the Radar map
description: This verifies that a user can select a spot from the compact map and open its spot page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Request an access code
Fill in the access code field with a valid numeric code
Submit the code
Open the Radar view
Open a spot from the map
Verify the spot page is displayed
Verify the spot timeline is visible

title: Create and publish a mutirão
description: This verifies that a user can complete a mutirão from the Actions flow and publish it successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials for the required role
Submit the login form
Open the Actions area
Start a new action
Choose mutirão
Fill in the mutirão type, title, and description
Add the location
Set a valid date and time
Add organization and volunteer details
Add a cover image
Publish the mutirão
Verify the published mutirão is visible in the Actions area
Verify the published mutirão is visible on the Map

title: Browse the Radar dashboard filters
description: This verifies that a user can switch between favorite, best-wave, and all feed filters on the Radar dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Request an access code
Fill in the access code field with a valid numeric code
Submit the code
Open the Radar view
Switch to the favorites feed filter
Switch to the best waves feed filter
Switch to the all feed filter
Verify the Radar feed updates for the selected filters
Verify recent spot activity remains visible

title: Browse a spot timeline over the tide curve
description: This verifies that a user can inspect the spot timeline positioned against the tide curve and move through different moments.

steps.description: Navigate to the public radar page
Open a spot from the radar
Move through the timeline slider
Verify the selected moment on the timeline changes
Verify the tide curve remains visible alongside the timeline

title: Browse map layers and open a related item
description: This verifies that a user can switch map layers, inspect clustered markers, and open a related page from the marker panel.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials for the required role
Submit the login form
Open the Map
Switch to the spots layer
Switch to the alerts layer
Switch to the mutirões layer
Zoom into a marker cluster
Select an individual marker
Open the related page from the marker panel
Verify the related spot or action page is displayed
Verify the selected item is shown in the marker panel

title: Choose a spot manually when publishing a surf report
description: This verifies that a contributor can switch from the nearest spot to a manually selected spot before publishing a surf report.

steps.description: Navigate to the public radar page
Start a quick photo capture
Capture or select an image
Choose a spot manually
Classify the post as a surf report
Add observations to the report
Publish the report
Verify a publish confirmation is visible
Verify the selected spot is highlighted on the radar and the photo appears in that spot timeline

title: View profile summary and history
description: This test verifies that a registered user can open their profile, review account statistics and contribution history, and see their privacy settings area.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the profile page
Verify account statistics are displayed
Verify contribution history is displayed

title: Save a mutirão draft and resume it later
description: This verifies that a user can save an in-progress mutirão as a draft, return later, continue editing, and publish it.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials for the required role
Submit the login form
Open the Actions area
Start a new action
Choose mutirão
Fill in the mutirão type, title, and description
Save the mutirão as a draft
Leave the Actions area
Return to the Actions area later
Open the saved draft
Continue editing the draft
Publish the mutirão
Verify the published mutirão is visible in the Actions area
Verify the draft is no longer shown as an incomplete item

title: View spots without a photo today on Radar
description: This verifies that a user can find the Radar section showing spots that do not have a photo for the current day.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Request an access code
Fill in the access code field with a valid numeric code
Submit the code
Open the Radar view
Review the spots without a photo today section
Verify spots without a photo today are displayed
Verify the section is populated or shows an empty state

title: Resume a saved alert draft and publish it
description: This verifies that a user can save an environmental alert draft, reopen it later, complete it, and publish it.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Fill in the login credentials for the required role
Submit the login form
Open the Actions area
Start a new action
Choose environmental alert
Fill in the alert details needed for a draft
Save the alert as a draft
Leave the Actions area
Return to the Actions area later
Open the saved alert draft
Complete the remaining alert details
Publish the alert
Verify the published alert is visible in the Actions area
Verify the completed alert is visible on the Map

title: Like a photo on a spot page
description: This verifies that a user can like a photo from the spot timeline and see the like state update.

steps.description: Navigate to the public radar page
Open a spot from the radar
Like a photo in the timeline
Verify the photo shows an active like state
Verify the spot timeline remains visible

title: Report a photo from a spot page
description: This verifies that a user can report a photo from the spot timeline and see the report flow complete in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to the public radar page
Open a spot from the radar
Report a photo in the timeline
Verify a report confirmation is visible
Verify the spot page remains visible

title: Review privacy settings from profile
description: This test verifies that a user can open the profile privacy area and access privacy and LGPD preferences from their account page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the profile page
Open the privacy and visibility settings area
Verify privacy preferences are displayed
Verify LGPD settings are displayed

title: Share a photo from a spot page
description: This verifies that a user can share a photo from the spot timeline and see the share action complete in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to the public radar page
Open a spot from the radar
Share a photo in the timeline
Verify a share confirmation is visible
Verify the spot timeline remains visible

title: Add optional profile details during setup
description: This verifies that a user can optionally add a main surf spot and profile photo during onboarding without blocking completion.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Request an access code
Fill in the access code field with a valid numeric code
Submit the code
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the CPF field with a valid CPF
Fill in the city field with a valid city
Optionally select a main surf spot
Optionally add a profile photo
Continue profile setup
Verify the logged-in Radar is displayed
Verify the optional profile details are saved

title: Add main surf spot to profile
description: This test verifies that a user can add an optional main surf spot in their profile and save it successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the profile page
Edit profile details
Set a main surf spot
Save the profile changes
Verify the profile update is reflected
Verify the main surf spot is displayed

title: Save an environmental alert draft and resume it later
description: This verifies that a user can save an incomplete environmental alert draft and return to continue editing it later.

steps.description: Navigate to the public radar page
Open the actions flow
Start a new action
Choose environmental alert
Select a category
Save the alert as a draft
Open the saved draft
Verify the draft content is restored
Verify the alert can be continued from the draft

title: Add profile photo to profile
description: This test verifies that a user can attach an optional profile photo and see it reflected on the profile page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Open the profile page
Edit profile details
Set a profile photo
Save the profile changes
Verify the profile update is reflected
Verify the profile photo is displayed

title: Grant camera and location permissions during onboarding
description: This verifies that a user can allow camera and location access and still complete the login and setup flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Request an access code
Fill in the access code field with a valid numeric code
Submit the code
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the CPF field with a valid CPF
Fill in the city field with a valid city
Grant camera access
Grant location access
Continue profile setup
Verify the logged-in Radar is displayed
Verify the permissions-dependent onboarding is completed

title: Resume a saved surf report draft
description: This verifies that a contributor can save a partially completed surf report draft and later resume it without losing the entered content.

steps.description: Navigate to the public radar page
Start a quick photo capture
Capture or select an image
Enter observations for the report
Save the report as a draft
Open the saved draft
Verify the draft content is restored
Verify the report can be continued from the draft

title: Show validation when required profile fields are missing
description: This verifies that onboarding blocks completion until the required identity and location fields are provided.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Request an access code
Fill in the access code field with a valid numeric code
Submit the code
Leave the name, CPF, and city fields empty
Continue profile setup
Verify profile validation errors are displayed
Verify setup cannot be completed

title: Install the app to the home screen
description: This test verifies that a visitor can initiate app installation and then launch the app in standalone mode.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the app install prompt
Choose to add the app to the device home screen
Launch the installed app
Verify the app opens in standalone mode
Verify the app home experience is displayed
